name: Metal Bin Large Green - Brightroom™
description:
You're sure to appreciate the organization this Large Metal Bin from Brightroom™ brings to your space. Designed in a square silhouette and featuring a deep design, this small metal bin comes in handy for stashing anything from small electronics and books to files, folders and more. The open-top design provides easy access to the contents, and the cutout handles make carrying it a breeze. Featuring a ribbed construction in a green hue, it's sure to integrate with different decor styles.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
